title: Balanced Search Trees and Order Statistics · Execution Trace: Rotation Invariants
summary: Maintain an ordered index with predictable latency during sorted and mixed updates. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 rotation invariants increment in a balanced-tree trace and order-statistic extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace rotations while preserving binary-search order and reconnecting every affected link.
Construct operation sequences that expose weak amortized claims and latency spikes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
